name: genome/adapter-info
description: Get detailed information about a specific LoRA adapter including full manifest, training provenance, architecture details, and compatibility status.

params.name: name
params.description: Adapter name or path to inspect

results.name: domain
results.description: Skill domain this adapter was trained for

results.name: sizeMB
results.description: Adapter size on disk in megabytes

results.name: baseModel
results.description: Base model this adapter was trained on

results.name: createdAt
results.description: ISO timestamp of when adapter was trained

results.name: lastUsedAt
results.description: ISO timestamp of last inference use

results.name: trainingInfo
results.description: Training provenance: dataset, epochs, loss, examples count

results.name: architecture
results.description: LoRA architecture: rank, alpha, target modules, layer count

results.name: compatibility
results.description: Model compatibility status: compatible models, quantization format

results.name: isActive
results.description: Whether this adapter is currently loaded in GPU memory
